sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22531" key="gnwsigrafi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνωσῐ-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">picturing of the effect</tr_> of a verdict, as a Rhetorical device, Aps.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg008:p.304" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.304</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
